nasb.text: “Ho there! Flee from the land of the north,” declares the Lord, “for I have dispersed you as the four winds of the heavens,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Up! Up! Flee from the land of the north, declares the Lord. For I have spread you abroad as the four winds of the heavens, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “嗨！嗨！你們要從北方之地逃走，因為我過去曾把你們分散在天的四方。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: “耶和华说，‘我曾把你们分散到天下四方，现在，快！快逃离北方之地。这是耶和华说的。
